title: Fagelia ericoides
taxonomy: Fagelia ericoides is classified within the family Ericaceae, commonly known as the heath family. This family consists of various flowering plants, including heath, heather, and rhododendron. Fagelia ericoides is a species within the genus Fagelia, which is a small group of flowering plants. The Ericaceae family is native to the Northern Hemisphere, with a majority of species found in the cooler, temperate climates. The classification of Fagelia ericoides reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Ericaceae family.
